description: Scale container dimensions by width and height ratios, or query the logical width and height of a container.
utility: Scale container size or query logical width/height of items

arguments.name: containers (for size)
arguments.description: One or more container variables to scale

arguments.name: widthRatio (for size)
arguments.description: Width scale factor (0.5 = half, 1 = no change, 2 = double)

arguments.name: heightRatio (for size)
arguments.description: Height scale factor (0.5 = half, 1 = no change, 2 = double)

arguments.name: ref (for w/h)
arguments.description: Reference to item for width/height query

alternates.description: Get logical width of container G
Get logical height of container G

examples.scenario: Shrink a graph to half size
Double the size of a graph

examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(2,2), 14, 14, type(plotting))
T = write(at(18,2), "f(x)")
size(G, T, 1.5, 1.5)

examples.scenario: Get width and height of a container
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(2,2), 14, 14, type(plotting))
width = w(G)
height = h(G)
